arts.ttl: A natural-born Galactico: Arsenal ace William Saliba can become Real Madrid's next great defender
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold and Bellingham went to a few concerts together - and seemed like good mates in a celebration at Euro 2024. Saliba is among the best centre-backs in the world.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make SENSATIONAL €200m bid for Real Madrid superstar
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr has been a key target for the Saudi Pro League over the past year or so, with multiple reports that there is a very real possibility he could move to Saudi Arabia this summer. Relevo report that the Real Madrid superstar has a €1 BILLION contract offer from Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Arsenal starter ‘prioritises’ summer move to Barcelona – Aiming high
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Thomas Partey ‘prioritises’ a move to Barcelona in the summer window. That’s according to Tuesday’s edition of Mundo Deportivo, and they also cover Barcelona’s stance on signing the midfielder. The Ghana international has less than three months left on his contract at Arsenal. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Real Madrid, 2025 UEFA Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s visit to London could very well define the 2024-25 season for Los Blancos. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Alaba, Camavinga, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

Mikel Arteta’s side are aiming to reach the semi-finals for the first time since 2008/09, but face a formidable challenge against the Spanish giants. 19 years later. arts.ttl: 'I love': Steve McManaman names the 'complete' Real Madrid midfielder who's better than Arsenal's Declan Rice
arts.sum: Steve McManaman has just named one of Real Madrid’s midfielders as being better than Arsenal’s Declan Rice which may surprise a few. Arsenal host Real Madrid in...

arts.ttl: Arsenal closer to Gyokeres signing as Man Utd pull out
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has moved a step closer to joining Arsenal this summer after Man Utd pulled out of the race for the Sweden star. Correio da Manha reports that Berta played a "decisive role" in the convincing Gyokeres to join Arsenal over multiple other top European clubs such as Man Utd, Barcelona, Chelsea and Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Can you name the teams last time Arsenal faced Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Arsenal have not come up against Real Madrid for almost a decade. Can you name the starting XI's from last time they faced each other?

arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Arsenal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the trip to England to take on Arsenal in the Champions League quarter-finals tonight. The holders head to North London aiming to secure a positive first-leg result. Carlo Ancelotti’s side are aiming to defend the trophy and reach the semi-finals for the fifth straight season. arts.ttl: Ancelotti’s major selection dilemma ahead of Real Madrid’s UCL opener against Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti must decide where to field Federico Valverde at the Emirates Stadium today, as the tournament holders take on Arsenal in the first leg of the Champions League quarter-finals. It is thought likelier that the Uruguayan will play in Madrid’s midfield in North London - with Lucas Vázquez given the nod on the right of defense - but Ancelotti said yesterday that he was still to reach a final decision .
